reviews.review_description: You can get the 2 demo levels for free but the only issue is that you have to pay like $49 at least to get any fun scenarios, I believe that it should at least give you a demo sporting clays level to be able to customize your target presentation. Overall decent game though, but still way too overpriced. I would rate it a lot higher if a game developer would take my opinion into consideration.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Our two demo scenarios are two of our most popular scenarios, hence why we offer them as demo. Please feel free to contact our support, they can help you change the scenarios you have purchased.  🙏

reviews.review_description:
I’m a hunter and busy father of three with little to no time to visit the shooting range. Gaim allows me to bring the shooting range into my own living room, allowing frequent (almost daily) shooting drills that have drastically improved my shooting skills, and ultimately my experience while out hunting. Not only has my shooting improved, but I have also boosted my confidence and become more aware of my own limitations. And did I mention that it’s a ton of fun as well?

I’d strongly recommend Gaim to any hunter who wishes to become a better shot.

After nearly three years of intense use, the trigger became unreliable. A quick email to the customer service team, and just a few days later, a new trigger had arrived in my postbox.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We love to hear that you enjoy the system and that it helps you improve your shooting. 👌

reviews.review_title: Unplayable for almost a year despite rep
reviews.review_description:
1-star review.

I have been unable to play this game properly for almost one year. After launching the app, I can select the rifle/controller and accept the terms/GDPR screen, but then the entire game turns completely black in 360 degrees. The only thing visible is the virtual rifle. No menu, no scenario, nothing.

I have contacted support more than 15 times, sent videos, followed every instruction, updated everything, uninstalled and reinstalled the app, and the issue is still not fixed.

This is not a headset problem. I first had the issue on Meta Quest 2, and I even bought a Meta Quest 3 specifically for this game, but the exact same problem happens on both headsets.

I have spent more than €200 on scenarios and extra content, plus around €500 on the initial game/equipment setup, and I cannot play at all. Support keeps giving generic answers or saying that a future update will fix it, but after almost a year, nothing has changed.

This is completely unacceptable. I strongly recommend avoiding this game until they actually fix serious account-related issues like this.

developer_response.body: We are verry sorry to hear that! Please contact our support so that we can escalate this matter. 🙏

reviews.review_description: Strongly recommended for busy shooters to practice in door and especially in out gulf countries region, keep it up
Its a good game but the scenarios should be in game and free

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that! Unfortunately its not possible to offer our product for free.

reviews.review_description: You got to buy like $49-$300 to even try more then two levels.

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear that the prizing did not match your vision.

reviews.review_description: With the a hindsight i had a rather lame question to GAIM. I sent it early afternoon on the 24th of December. Frankly, i expected to receive the answer sometime after Xmas (and that would have been perfectly reasonable). Instead i received a clarification question at around 7 pm on the 24th. I answered it prior to midnight. Guess what! I received the full assistance in the morning of the 25th…Very polite and helpful answer. I am amazed….Thank you GAIM!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We are glad to help!!✨

reviews.review_description: We had an issue because we had purchased two different games, which meant the license keys needed to be linked together. I received quick responses from GAIM both by email and phone — very helpful, quick and polite service.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Glad we could help! 🙌

reviews.review_description: Thanks for the free demo but...You got to be kidding with the price too get more. Hundreds of dollars?? Who in their right mind.....

developer_response.body: Hi, we are sorry to hear that the pricing didn't meet your standars.

reviews.review_description: I went from zero to hero within weeks. I never expected that I could improve so much in real life. I wasn‘t a particularly good shot before. Maybe that‘s why it worked so well. For me, it‘s worth every penny.

developer_response.body: That's amazing to hear! 🤩

reviews.review_title: Not ideal but there is potential
reviews.review_description:
Gaim has several issues. Some of them are not the developers’ fault, but others could definitely be improved. I’ll start with the problems they can’t really control and then move on to the ones that should be addressed.
	1.	I personally use a Quest 2, and the tracking is not ideal. The headset is partially blocked by the rifle stock, which means that precise shots at around 50 meters are no longer possible because the weapon suddenly starts bugging or drifting. This might be better with a Quest 3, but I can’t judge that myself.
	2.	When pulling the trigger, the entire weapon sometimes jerks due to the small physical impulse. You can clearly see this movement in VR, and it also shows in the shot placement. This is extremely frustrating, especially when shooting at small targets like a fox.
	3.	The ballistics feel too slow. This might be caused by trigger delay, but in that case the ballistics should be artificially adjusted. Otherwise, this becomes a real issue for actual hunters who use Gaim for practice before shooting real animals. In addition, there should be an option to choose different calibers. I believe this is definitely something the developers could implement, and it would significantly improve the overall experience.
	4.	Another issue is hit detection and animal reactions. In real life, if I shoot at a wild boar piglet or a fox and miss the lung by just 1 cm, the animal would most likely still die. I understand that the developers don’t want to reward bad shooting, but the animals should at least show some reaction even if no vital organ is hit.
	5.	A wider selection of zoom levels would also be nice. Only having 1x, 3x, and 6x feels quite limiting.

I believe the developers could definitely fix several of these issues and make the experience far less frustrating and much more enjoyable. Sometimes it really annoys me when I barely miss the lung and the fox suddenly becomes even faster. That feels unrealistic and unfortunately leads to me using Gaim less and less for practice

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Please contact our support, info@gaim.com they can help you. We appreciate your suggestions for future development and will keep it in mind. 🙏

reviews.review_description:
GAIM is a great simulator, but the fixed bullet speed (V0) creates a serious problem for driven-hunt training.

Many modern hunting bullets are much faster than the speeds GAIM uses.
My .30-06 load is 960 m/s, but GAIM simulates it much slower (~820–850 m/s).
A slower bullet means a much bigger lead is needed in GAIM than in real life.

On a driven hunt (40–80 m), this difference is big enough that a hunter who trains with GAIM could easily aim too far forward in real life — which can lead to wounded game.

This is why a simple option to enter real muzzle velocity (and BC) is essential.
Without it, GAIM teaches the wrong timing and wrong lead for many modern hunting loads.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your ideas for improvement. We will forward your request to our developers.🙌

reviews.review_description:
Excellent equipment for shooting training.  Fun also.  Can be addictive.  Reveal real shooting skill (and lack of).  
4 stars because:  Wooden stock should have been heavier.  A real rifle weights twice as much.  Miss bolt action needed before firing next shot.  Is system vulnerable to unskilled use?  Experienced trigger failure when changing from rifle to pistol.  Customer service was, however, excellent.  2 new triggers was sent and got installation help by phone.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Please feel free to give us your feedback via info@gaim.com 🙏

reviews.review_description: This game is so addictive and amazing, I had so much fun just playing the demo I had to get some of the game scenarios... The bears coming at you feel so real and life like, I really enjoyed the game graphics and life like hunting...

developer_response.body: Thank you, we appreciate it! 🙌

reviews.review_title: Gaim 5 of 5 for training muscle memory
reviews.review_description: Excellent and must have for hunters to train muscle memory. Realistic scenarios and look and feel holding the rifle, following the game and pulling the trigger. After the shot you can analyze rifle movement. I feel more confident in the field having done 3000+ training shots. Upgraded from the wooden stock to Blaser Gaim and now using own rifle for increased near real life training. Exellent and fast Support responses. Don't hesitate just get it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support, we are always happy to hear that you enjoy the system! Keep on the good practise! ✨

reviews.review_description: Loads of fun for anyone that likes to hunt. Very realistic,  good wingshooting and clay practice.  No trips, no inclement weather,  no insects, no boring hunts with no action, no birds to clean. Enough said?

developer_response.body: That's sounds amazing! Glad you enjoy the system! ✨

reviews.review_title: Some good, some bad,and some embarrasing
reviews.review_description:
The sportshooting simulator is working fine for a lot of things. You have ipsc-targets, you have the option to use a rifle and you have your own trigger which works very good. 
The bad is that shooting while moving works bad. You can see your dot moving sideways, and your point of impact is far of the red dot. Beware to not get bad habits. My training is now only with movement between shots. 
The embarrasing part of the review is the scoring. You would think the company would know how to score points. I’ve reported this twice, months ago, but nothing happens. They score Mikes as -5 points. Still no feedback after months. BTW…I have passed 50000 shots. 
Bjarte Nygard
Norway

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Please contact our support: Info@gaim.com or call us +46 40 685 37 00
One of our colleagues will help you as soon as possible!

reviews.review_description: Had an issue with a purchase, and had to get assistance from costumer service. Really service minded and helpful. Fixed my problem right away.

developer_response.body: Thank you verry much, we are happy to help!🙌

reviews.review_description: i love this game

developer_response.body: Love to hear that! ✨

reviews.review_description: It’s an awesome game but I want to figure out how to get codes for the game instead of playing demo

developer_response.body: Thank you! Please contact our support info@gaim.com 🙌

reviews.review_description: Doesnt kill animals even though i shot a pig 29 times in the head
It's an excellent simulator if you want to pratcice IPSC shooting during bad weather and not wasting  your ammo. Also Helpdesk is very helpful and can solve any issues with the app quickly.

developer_response.body: You got a good point! Thank you for your feedback!✨

reviews.review_description: I just got the new duck hunting scenario using the Black Friday 20% discount. It is a lot of fun! The ducks just keep coming! Thanks Gaim!

First of all, I am in the US, and it was delivered to me faster than expected at my door. I got the hold package, so I got Meta Quest 3s at no extra charge for their promotion. There was no import fee either at the time, since there was no tariff at the time when I bought it. It is fun going hunting, shooting clay or doing steel challenge, etc.. though yes, it does have a bug once in a while, my pistol might go flying, etc, but this is rare, only when I do lots of iterations. I said it is flexible because I can play it whenever I want and not worry about disturbing anyone in my house or my neighbors.  It does help me with target acquisition, trigger pull, etc, and with trigger times, it will definitely help me improve with my shooting. Like others have said already. Their supporting team is outstanding. I usually DM them directly on their IG page and they always reply to me. Same for sending a question through email, but on IG, they replied rather quickly.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We are so happy to hear that you enjoy the system and that you are happy with our support! Please feel free to share your experience on our social media as well!🙌✨

reviews.review_description:
Nothing to compare to on market

excellent customer service

reviews.review_description:
5 star review all day long - I strongly recommend! 

This is an amazing hunting and training tool that has yielded real results. Not only have I greatly improved my skeet and trap scores, but I’m shooting with both eyes open and getting instant feedback. The hunting games are also fun and addictive.

Support after the sale is also amazing, thank you!!

reviews.review_description:
The product 
is awesome. It has massively improved my success rate on driven hunts. Exceptionally realistic training to scan surroundings and and "shootability" of boar. You learn to differentiate between female and male and learn when a shot does simply not make sense.

After sales support
is the best I have ever experienced from all my purchases online in brick and mortar shops. VERY well done and thank you!

reviews.review_description: Great product. Top service and support

reviews.review_description: GAIM!!!  The best possible way for hunters and shooters to stay in training and significantly improve in the off-season, significantly improve awareness in real hunting and shooting situations, the adrenaline rush is real.  Thanks to the Gaim rifle - an excellent walnut stock and a trigger that can be adjusted to imitate the trigger of the rifle you use, it helps to maintain the muscle memory of the movement. Collaboration with Aimpoint and the ability to choose Aimpoint red dot in the application is superbly done. Scenarios well done visually and sonically.  I personally prefer driven hunt.  Compliments to Gaim support.  For someone who is not involved in hunting or shooting, the closest and best possible way to get close to the real feeling, Not to mention the savings in ammunition and fuel - is the shooting range, and if there is one for free use, it is often far away.

Your praise for the adjustable rifle, Aimpoint collaboration, and sound/visual design means a lot. Wishing you continued success!🙌

reviews.review_description: I like the game but the problem is I have controlers only so the stock glitches out whenever I try to rest the gun up against my chest to aim

reviews.review_description: I have been using the Gaim app for several months and the game offer realistic training for stand hunting. The game is pretty intense while the drive is on. It offers lots of varied shooting scenarios, but I hope they renew some of the scenarios and maybe offer some kind of dynamic scenario. Maybe a stalk?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad you enjoy the realistic training and engaging scenarios. Your suggestion for adding dynamic scenarios like stalking is noted and much appreciated. 🙌🤝

reviews.review_description:
I use GAIM because it offers a much more affordable way to train compared to other competitors. The big advantage is being able to practice comfortably in my living room, and with today’s ammo prices, it makes training significantly cheaper overall. True, it doesn’t work perfectly in very bright outdoor light, but that doesn’t take away from the overall experience. The distance up to 75 meters is a great opportunity to practice and has been very useful for improving my skills. I’d love to see longer training distances and the addition of optical sights in the future — even though I know Aimpoint doesn’t produce those directly. Also, I think the trigger could be improved in future versions, making it smoother and more responsive, similar to PS5 controller triggers.

I’m extremely happy that I decided to get GAIM early on — it has helped improve my reaction speed and tracking stability, and I honestly can’t wait to see the new hardware updates in the future. I definitely recommend GAIM to anyone looking for an affordable and effective training solution!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad GAIM has enhanced your training and appreciate your suggestions for future updates. Happy training! 🎯

reviews.review_description: Great game for practicing shooting. I only have 2 things I didn’t like. When shooting, I couldn’t see the dot on my sights. Especially when I was shooting at targets. The other thing I thought would be funnier was if you could move around in the game or be able to wounded through the woods while hunting

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you enjoyed the game. We'll note your suggestions for future improvements.🙌

reviews.review_description:
It is a great "Game" to train your precision and muscle memory that will improve your accuracy and responsiveness without using any real life ammunition. It needs to be pointed out that this is where the "Game" is focused on, and it should, as it's the main purpose. The company is progressing and thankfully becoming more mature. The focus hopefully will also shift a bit more to the game experience and more realistic graphics. They did a great job upgrading the bear scenario recently and hopefully soon the other scenarios as well. 

Personally I would like to see more variety in the POV position possibilities within the existing scenarios, which should then also increase the direction variety the wildlife is approaching your stand. This will make it less predictable, keeps you engaged and challenges you even more! Keep up the good work!

Remark: finding out that there is an annual €149,- subscription for using the 'Gaim range' instead of a one time purchase as all the other scenarios, makes me regret the purchase of the training handgun unfortunately.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate your ideas about adding variety to our scenarios. We're continuously working on improving the experience. Thanks for sharing! 😊

reviews.review_title: Perfect training even after years in use
reviews.review_description:
I have been a user of the GAIM hunting simulator since the very first hours. Shortly after its release, it was the only way to do shooting practice, as all shooting ranges were closed due to Covid. Since then, the simulator has improved amazingly in terms of user-friendliness and the loving design of the training situations. It fulfils all the requirements of hunting training with static or dynamic shooting, whether with a shotgun, rifle or even a handgun. Sport shooting scenes are also available, opening up the trainer to a wider range of customers.
GAIM's great support leaves no questions unanswered if questions or feature requests are not answered by the many step-by-step instructions or video tutorials.
The weight of the rifle stock is perfectly balanced. As is the feel of the handgun in the hand. There are only two things that the simulator cannot fulfil and that you cannot avoid practising with the real gun:
* There is (currently) no complete replica of the locking systems and safety options on the "weapons". The simulator can therefore not be used to practise the safe handling of the weapon including dummy cartridges or manual repeating.
* The simulator cannot provide recoil. However, this is not a drawback, but an ideal anti-shake training. Some of my friends first noticed when trying out the trainer how they actively try to counteract the recoil. They said it's a good trainer for getting rid of the fear of the shot.
I really love the trainer. In Germany, tolerance towards shooting ranges is decreasing and more and more shooting ranges are being closed. As a result, the effort and cost of real training is becoming ever greater and more expensive. Overall, I have trained much more with the simulator than I would have done without it. And I can see it on the shooting range. I can effectively using my time there. I love doing a few drills before a real training session as I can correct myself with the great shot analysis tool. GAIM leaves nothing to be desired in my eyes.
                                                           Many thanks to the GAIM team!

developer_response.body: We’re excited to hear how much you value the GAIM simulator, even after years of use. The improvements in usability, realistic training scenarios, and the versatility for rifles, shotguns, and handguns clearly make a difference in your practice. It’s great to know our shot analysis tool helps optimize your time at the range. Thank you for highlighting the thoughtful design and support—we’re so glad GAIM enhances your training experience! 💥🐗

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely amazing. My family, friends and I are completely hooked

GAIM has completely transformed the way we train for hunting. The realistic driven hunt scenarios like Wild Boar Corn Field for big game and Mallard Duck for small game are incredibly effective. They help improve reflexes, timing, and accuracy with both shotgun and rifle.

Some scenarios like Simpro Hunting and Simpro Hunting Exam also include stationary game which is great for practicing calm and precise shots, a useful addition to the fast-paced action.

Everyone who’s tried it totally understands why I bought GAIM. After just a few minutes in the simulator, they’re hooked too. It just makes sense.

The White Tail Deer Trail, which seems based on Finland, is one of our favorites. It would be amazing if it could be expanded with moose, roe deer, and maybe even raccoon dogs to make it feel even more like a true Finnish hunting experience.

We also really enjoy the Wild Boar Hunting Lane. Of course, there are already red deer stags included, but adding hinds and calves would be a great addition. It would also be fantastic to include fallow deer and roe deer of both sexes and various ages, making it the perfect and highly realistic European driven hunt simulator.

A new scenario with rabbits, hares, or roe deer would also be great for sharpening reflexes on smaller ground game.

GAIM is incredibly fun and realistic, and it has genuinely improved how we shoot on moving and standing game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're thrilled to hear how much you and your loved ones are enjoying GAIM. And we will take your ideas in to consideration in future developments. 🐗

reviews.review_description: I think a lot more people would buy the game if it wasn't mandatory to buy the rifle, but you could just play with a controller, and then people would buy all the levels.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback! Our system is created to offer the best virtual hunting experience possible. Therefor we also want to make sure that the hardware can meet our high standards. 🙌

reviews.review_description:
Just wanted to share how impressed I am with the GAIM virtual shooting simulator! 🎯

I’d been looking for a way to sharpen my skills with moving targets, and after some research, I came across GAIM. I’ll admit—I was a bit hesitant about the price at first. But once I had the chance to try the long gun simulator in person, I realized I was looking at a top-tier, high-quality training tool.

This isn’t your typical video game. GAIM uses real-world physics for a lifelike experience—more like being at a clay range or out in the field hunting. The attention to detail blew me away: realistic ballistics, the need to hit vital organs in hunting modes, and natural target movement.

🔹 What I love most:

Immediate, clear feedback on missed shots so you can learn and improve fast

Easy gun-fitting controls for a proper setup

Unlimited virtual ammo—no more worrying about the cost of live rounds!

Convenient home practice so I can train more often

And most importantly—it’s a blast to use!

If you’re into hunting or sport shooting and want a realistic, effective, and fun way to train, GAIM is 100% worth it.
GAIM has been a game-changer for me! 👏

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for the great review and providing us with valuable feedback.

reviews.review_description:
As a passionate hunter and outdoorsman, staying sharp year-round is more than a hobby — it’s a way of life. That’s why a few years ago, I invested in the Gaim Hunting Simulator, and it’s hands down one of the best decisions I’ve made for improving my shooting skills.

Whether I’m practicing quick target acquisition with the shotgun or refining long-range precision with the rifle, Gaim has become an essential part of my training. Using it with the VR stock adds a whole new level of realism — it’s not just a game; it’s muscle memory training.

The real game-changer is the ability to simulate realistic hunting scenarios. I’ve used it to prepare for everything from driven hunts to more challenging stalking shots. Being able to train at home during the off-season, when I can’t be out in the field, helps me keep my skills sharp and my instincts tuned.

What I appreciate most is the freedom to experiment. I’ve tried out new stances, techniques, and follow-throughs — things I might hesitate to do during a real hunt. And because it tracks my performance, I can actually see where I’m improving and where I need more work.

But it’s not just about hitting targets. Gaim has helped me build confidence, stay connected to my passion year-round, and even introduced a new way to share my love for hunting with friends and family who try it and immediately get hooked.

If you’re serious about hunting — whether you’re a seasoned shooter or just starting out — Gaim isn’t just a simulator. It’s a powerful tool to help you grow, improve, and stay inspired no matter the season.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for the great review and providing us with valuable feedback.

reviews.review_title: Great for improving aim and practicing t
reviews.review_description:
I’ve been using GAIM to practice target transitions and weapon handling during aiming, and it has really helped me improve. One of the best features is being able to track exactly where your shot landed and how your movement affected it – the feedback is clear and detailed.

I've noticed a measurable improvement in my aim, which I was able to confirm during live-fire sessions at the shooting cinema.

Of course, the gunstock doesn’t replicate the full weight and feel of a real rifle, and the trigger lacks a pressure point, so it won’t fully replace live training – but it’s a fantastic way to complement it.

Plus, it’s just a lot of fun to use. GAIM is a great tool for any shooter looking to sharpen their skills at home.

developer_response.body:
Thank You for Your Feedback!
It’s great to hear how GAIM has improved your aim and weapon handling, with clear feedback helping you refine your skills. While it can’t fully replace live training, we’re glad it’s a fun and effective complement to your practice. Happy training! 🙏💥

reviews.review_description:
Review: 5 out of 5 stars

I’ve owned the Gaim Hunting Rifle for about half a year now, and it has significantly improved my skills in dynamic shooting—especially when it comes to wild boar and other large, tough game. We really appreciate the concept behind it; everything is impressively realistic and well-simulated in the training videos. The rifle itself has a convincing weight and replicates the handling of a real firearm very well.

One of the most valuable aspects has been the analysis feature. We’ve learned a lot from reviewing our shots, which helps us ensure a quick and humane kill—because animal welfare is something we care deeply about. With the driven hunt season coming up this November, our group is planning intensive practice sessions to refine our skills even further, with the aim of improving our efficiency and making clean, ethical shots.

It’s also a lot of fun—there’s a strong sporting element to it, especially when practiced in a group. We’re a small hunting group that trains regularly with this system, and it brings us together for enjoyable evenings and a healthy dose of competition. The benefits go beyond training: using the simulation saves on ammunition and wear on real firearms, which is both cost-effective and better for the equipment.

For us, this game-based training system is an outstanding, well-rounded solution that we wholeheartedly recommend.

On top of that, I recently bought a handgun to improve my pistol shooting skills, an area where I had no previous experience. My wife is interested too, as the rifle is too heavy for her. With the pistol, we’ve both been able to enjoy training and have a lot of fun doing so.

All in all: a great concept, a great invention, and a great experience. We’re having fun, and we’re happy to recommend it.

5 out of 5 stars.

developer_response.body:
Thank You for Your Review!

We’re thrilled that Gaim has enhanced your shooting skills, helped prepare for the hunt season, and brought fun competition to your group training. It’s great to hear the system supports humane shots while saving on costs and wear.

We’re also glad the handgun addition provides versatility and enjoyable training for you and your wife. Thank you for recommending Gaim—wishing you a successful hunting season! 🐗🤝

reviews.review_description: Game keeps redownloading no matter how many times u delete it that seems like malware nice job devs

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Please contact our support: Info@gaim.com or call us +46 40 685 37 00
One of our colleagues will help you as soon as possible!

reviews.review_description: Use GAIM Virtual Reality Simulator to launch a community VR training program for aspiring hunters and shooters in underserved areas. Partner with local youth groups to set up GAIM Complete stations (Meta Quest-compatible) for immersive, safe marksmanship training. Focus on ethical hunting and safety using GAIM’s realistic scenarios like clay shooting or big game hunts. Host a virtual tournament to showcase skills, inspiring confidence and community connection. This empowers beginners, fosters responsible outdoor engagement, and makes shooting sports accessible without ammo or range costs.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for the great review and providing us with valuable feedback.

reviews.review_description: A good game with decent graphics.

developer_response.body: Regarding the graphics, please contact our support info@gaim.com 🙏

reviews.review_description:
As an IPSC shooter and instructor, consistent, realistic dry practice is key to improvement, especially when it comes to movement, transitions, and stage planning. GAIM VR enters the scene promising to modernize dry fire with immersive visuals and dynamic courses. 

If you’re an IPSC shooter looking to boost target transitions, movement mechanics, and first-shot performance, GAIM is a powerful immersive tool. It doesn't replace live fire but it's a next-level supplement that makes training far more engaging.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review! It’s fantastic to be part of your training journey, making practice more immersive and effective💪

reviews.review_description: Ingredibly realistic and helpful. Fantastic Gamification of Shooting practice, making me a better hunter. First couple of hundred practice shots already on the books that would have never happened in real life. Thanks

developer_response.body: Thank you! Glad to hear it’s helping your practice and making you a better hunter. Keep it up! 🎯

reviews.review_description: Wide range of stages for shotgun, pistol, and rifle shooting. Provides excellent feedback on shot placement, making correction easier and progress faster. Makes it easy to practice shooting without time and cost (gas, ammo) of heading to the range.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for the great review and providing us with valuable feedback.

reviews.review_description: Great product, has improved my shooting ability more than what 10 years of hunting has given me! Last season I managed a well placed shot in close quarters on a mouflon ram, no doubt thanks to gaim!

developer_response.body:
Thank You for Your Incredible Feedback!
It’s amazing to hear how much GAIM has contributed to improving your shooting skills—especially beyond what 10 years of hunting had provided. Congratulations on your well-placed shot on the mouflon ram last season! Knowing that GAIM played a role in your success truly makes all our efforts worthwhile. Wishing you continued progress and more memorable moments in the field! 💥🐏

reviews.review_title: From Virtual Training to Real Precision
reviews.review_description:
When I first discovered GAIM and the Driven Hunting Lane scenario, I immediately saw its potential. As a passionate hunter, I was looking for a way to train effectively for driven hunts, without time constraints or expensive ammunition. After spending hours on this mode, I can confidently say that it completely changes the way I approach driven hunting shots.

This scenario is incredibly immersive: animals appear randomly, with realistic and unpredictable trajectories. You can’t rely on repetitive patterns, which forces you to react instantly and adjust your shots to each situation. Every hunt feels unique, and the more you train, the faster and more precise you become.

One of the biggest advantages for me was training to shoot with both eyes open using a red dot sight. Being cross-eye dominant, I’ve always had to adapt to acquire targets quickly and efficiently. Thanks to this scenario, I’ve been able to build muscle memory, improve my reflexes, and enhance my target acquisition speed. The fluidity and accuracy of my shots have significantly improved in real-life hunting situations.

GAIM is also one of the only simulators that faithfully reproduces animal anatomy and real ballistics. Training in Hunting Lane helped me develop consecutive shooting skills, and I even managed to hit a triple on wild boars, something I couldn’t have imagined before. The skills I’ve gained here directly translate to real hunts.

GAIM is the ultimate training tool for hunters of all levels. Beginners sharpen their fundamentals, while seasoned shooters push their reflexes and precision to the limit. Every session challenges you to improve, with a feedback system that turns every missed shot into a lesson and every hit into a step toward mastery.

Driven Hunting Lane isn’t just a scenario : it’s a true training ground for driven hunts. GAIM has helped me improve like never before, and I’m ready for even bigger challenges! 🔥

🎯 My high score is ready—how about yours?

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for the great review and providing us with valuable feedback.

reviews.review_description: Stupid

developer_response.body: We are sorry that you feel that way. Please feel free to contact our support if you want to give us any more feedback.🙌

reviews.review_description:
When I first set up my Meta Quest 3 (MQ3) with GAIM I was a bit confused as I could not find the GAIM controller/trigger in the bluetooth list of my MQ3.
Although I updated my MQ3 as suggested in the GAIM forum, but nothing changed.

Finally, I got in touch with Ibrahim from GAIM support. He told me that I had to use the light on the trigger as a kind of button. Great, I missed this point by then. But still, no GAIM controller showed up in my bluetooth list.

The solution at the end was to do a complete factory reset of my MQ3 and following Ibrahim's advice to press the light button. I could then see the controller in my bluetooth list.
For getting the GAIM trigger paired I had to restart my MQ3 and do the pairing once again.

Since then everything is working perfectly as expected.

Thanks to Ibrahim who showed me the right way!

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for the great review and providing us with valuable feedback.

reviews.review_title: Gaim enables me to practice traveling
reviews.review_description: I am due to my job a lot on business trips. Having GAIM now is a game changer! Relaxing evenings practicing for the next hunt. This is adding so much value to all trips and closes the gap between the monthly visits at the shooting range! I am so happy I bought GAIM and it’s definitely worth the price! Great thing!

developer_response.body: Thank you! Great to hear it’s improving your skills and making practise easier! 🐗

reviews.review_description: An accurate, instantly lethal shot should be the goal of every hunter. Especially on hunts where the game moves at different speeds full of adrenaline. After researching Gaimhunting in detail, I realised that this is exactly what the software allows you to practise from home without any problems and in a fun way. If you talk about the fun of shooting, you are often criticised. Another pro-factor is the sociability that comes from training with your hunting buddies, without missing out on a tasty beer on the side and valuable training tips from your own ranks. You can also learn from each other! And who knows, maybe another person will find their way to a hunting licence or at least a sport shooting licence. Examination fears before shooting can be overcome, fun after a driven hunt by playing together or simple training from home. All of this is possible with Gaim, which is why l've had it on my wish list for a long time & love it now!

reviews.review_description:
I had some trouble using a discount code during the shopping process, but GAIM support was very helpful and kind in restarting the process and renewing the code.

Later on I received the stock but the screws were absent to fixate the trigger, GAIM support replied to me very fast and sent me the necessary screws.

Overall I had a very good customer experience, small hickups can occur, but how they are handled is important. And in my case they were always handled competent, efficient and nice.

for that , its one star.   fix your guns and maybe this would be worth something.

A fantastic discovery—highly recommended!

reviews.review_title: The trigger is a terrible product..
reviews.review_description:
Bought this when the product was new, the games are fun and well made but the trigger is just a pain. 
I only got it to work a few times, almost every time i wanted to use it it took 30 minutes or more to get it working, IF it worked at all. The support more or less told me I had to live with it and there was nothing they could do about it. I've given up and haven't touched it in a very long time. A total waist of money for me.

reviews.review_title: Pretty mid aim sim, god awful pricing
reviews.review_description:
So first of all, yes i know how it saves money on both range days and hunting trips
HOWEVER
€320 for the full game not including the stock is outrageous considering that the games features, graphics and gun models lack in both looks and animation
Not the best way to simulate gun training if there is no ingame recoil, animation or muzzle fire with the guns being that of a bb gun with hitscan.
 for a matter of fact
This along with the fact that the graphics and models are so low teir they look as if they were a game jam project by some basic highschooler who used unity to make this just makes that amount unspeakable. 
If you wish for a better deal you may aswell pay a fiverr dude €50 for him to make a game of the same quality and same features in a month. Even better, you can get gunstocks or 3d prints online that could do 100x better than theirs.
Either improve the games quality, features or pricing to expand your playerbase than just hunting hipster douchebags.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for the review.

Its a simulator, not a game. 
Our rifle stock is meticulously handcrafted in Italy, ensuring exceptional quality and durability. It's comparable in price to replacement stocks for high-end hunting rifles. The front adapter itself is not costly, but what sets our product apart is the Bluetooth trigger. Carefully designed and manufactured in Sweden, it connects to your headset and provides an authentic trigger feel. Unlike other simulators where you simply press a handcontroller button, our trigger offers a realistic shooting experience.
Moreover, our software is developed in-house by our dedicated team of Swedish developers. Their expertise and commitment ensure a top-notch shooting experience. With correct ballistics and animal anatomy.

 When you consider our meticulous process and the attention to detail we put into every aspect, our pricing is completely justified.

reviews.review_description: It’s a standing duck shooter…….it’s a range shooter……you can’t hunt…..VR hunter is hunting…..this is a 10 mins I’m bored shooter…..the reviews are lame…..hunters do not wait for animals to run past…..they hunt them……this is target practice……so it’s a target simulator

You need a license key to get the full version and be able to buy all the maps. You get your license key from buying either GAIM Hunting, GAIM Sport Shooting or GAIM Complete.You can find prices and more info here www.gaim.com.

Have also major issues with the software and my quest. 

Customer service is a steep curve to deal with.

reviews.review_description: bro there’s so many free games out there that offer exactly what you guys offer with less lag and more movement and freedoms lower the prices and let us enjoy it already bruh all this extra going to a different website instead of just buying it in the oculus store as a add on was extremely frustrating and irritating to even have to deal with just to find out it’s $35 for a map that’s just yellow instead of white with a slightly bigger animated lunk of meat hurtling itself across my screen with no change what so ever might as well played the demo the whole time do not waste your money

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Our rifle stock is meticulously handcrafted in Italy, ensuring exceptional quality and durability. It's comparable in price to replacement stocks for high-end hunting rifles. The front adapter itself is not costly, but what sets our product apart is the Bluetooth trigger. Carefully designed and manufactured in Sweden, it connects to your headset and provides an authentic trigger feel. Unlike other simulators where you simply press a handcontroller button, our trigger offers a realistic shooting experience.
Moreover, our software is developed in-house by our dedicated team of Swedish developers. Their expertise and commitment ensure a top-notch shooting experience. With correct ballistics and animal anatomy. When you consider our meticulous process and the attention to detail we put into every aspect, our pricing is completely justified.
It's also worth noting that compared to other hunting simulators where you shoot at a screen, our product offers a significantly more immersive and realistic experience at a fraction of the cost.

You are very welcome email us at info@gaim.com if you have any further questions or concerns, our customer service team is always ready to help.

reviews.review_title: Great but a loooooong way to go
reviews.review_description:
The experience in VR is great, and addictive in a positive way. The different scenery and game experience is super nice. You practise and become a better Hunter in a realistic environment. It could easy be a 5 star from me. 

However…

Unfortunatley the trigger system/Bluetooth connection is more or less crapp. Its unstable, switches off in the midle of a game, and does some times not work at all. Gaim should fix this matter and replace the trigger mechanism, and send new ones that work to everyone who has bought this. 
It could have been a full score, but the Bluetooth issue is super annoying and destroys the overall impression.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for your review and providing us with valuable feedback.
We're sorry for the issue with the paring of the trigger. Please contact us at info@gaim.com for further assistance. Our customer service team is always ready to help.

reviews.review_description: It would be great if you could choose between open sight or red dot. Especially on duck hunting. Some people perform better with open sight. I feel like red dot limits me. I feel like this would be a great option to add.

developer_response.body: You have the settings icon behind or to your right. Click that cog-wheel to open weapon settings. There you can change red dot sight to iron sight or ghost rings yourself. Same sight settings are available for all weapon types.

reviews.review_description:
Simulation listed as free, only to be hit by a massive $500+ paywall for the “full experience” (in addition to about $50 per stage) as soon as you start.

They offer a demo, which feels a lot like a cheap Cabela arcade game knockoff rather than the realistic simulation it is supposedly. How the hell is this suppose to get me ready for a hunting trip? This is more like a carnival game simulator where you shoot pictures of animals moving in a straight line.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for the feedback.
The app is free and includes two demo software.
To have full access to the simulator you need to buy on of our starting packages. You can find prices and more info here www.gaim.com

Our shooting simulator has a ballistics engine, on the rifle it is based on a win 308. It calculates the trajectory of the bullet or shotgun pellets in a correct way. For example demanding the right amount of lead ahead of a running animal. It is a challenging but common shot during a driven hunt in Europe to shot wild boar and deer in the run. I hope you get the chance to try the full version of GAIM. I am quite certain you would be convinced and see its quality as practice. Given the amount of experienced hunters that has given us the feedback that it gives them great practice.

reviews.review_description:
The game looks great, the guns are a bit hard to handle. I really wish it would be more of a hunting game as opposed to a “duck hunt” kinda thing.

I would like to be able to see the animals I shot up close.

Calls would be cool to add.

Being able to move is always a plus IMO 

For duck hunting having a dog to retrieve would be cool.

Imagine this: I want to go Turkey hunting. I select Turkey hunts, I select a map, I select my weapon. On the map I can see points of interest (ie: cornfield, creek, lake) the hunt starts as the sun is rising or falling, you can set up decoys, look through binoculars, put on scent blocker. I have one tag, I want the biggest one, it has to be a male. I call the Turkey in, hit it, follow a blood trail, pick it up and carry it to the pickup. This could all be done within 5-10 minutes and repeated endlessly!
It hacks ur vbuxk

reviews.review_title: Great vr, but its not worth it
reviews.review_description:
Gun weight is real, trigger action is good, but the game  is clunky, shot physics are good, but other than that, the software side ruins the experience.The stock should be raised so that the headset doesn't touch the rest of the gun. 
Fix these issues and it will be a 10/10

People want it to be free, and giving it 1 star accordingly, buy the kit then you have the right to review

developer_response.body: Ghostingray, there is a settings menu in main menu (cog wheel to your top right). There you can adjust the virtual weapon so your physical weapon does not interfere with headset. There are some instruction videos inside settings menu and also on website. Please let us know when you have made the settings changes!
